hero.title: Trustworthy Translations,
hero.subtitle: Linguara uses decentralized AI consensus to deliver accurate, context-aware translations across 100+ languages — with cryptographic proof of quality.

features.title: Enterprise-grade translation infrastructure
features.subtitle: Every translation passes through multi-agent AI consensus before delivery

consensus.title: AI Consensus
consensus.desc: 3 independent AI agents translate simultaneously. Consensus determines the best output.

semantic.title: Semantic Verification
semantic.desc: Meaning, tone, and cultural context verified before delivery.

confidence.title: Confidence Scores
confidence.desc: Every translation ships with a cryptographically-backed trust score.

audit.title: Immutable Audit Trail
audit.desc: Every translation decision is recorded on-chain via GenLayer.

legal.title: Legal & Healthcare
legal.desc: Domain-specific translation for contracts, medical records, and government docs.

wallet.title: Your Wallet, Your Identity
wallet.desc: Every account gets a unique blockchain wallet. Export your private key anytime.

step1.title: Submit content
step1.desc: Paste text, upload a document, or drop an image.

step2.title: AI agents translate
step2.desc: 3 independent agents produce translations in parallel.

step3.title: Consensus verification
step3.desc: Semantic validators reach consensus on the best translation.

step4.title: Verified delivery
step4.desc: Receive your translation with a confidence score and on-chain proof.

auth.agreeTerms: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy
auth.walletCreated: A blockchain wallet will be created for your account
